items.name_en: , [Extended Shoulder Strap] 🥰 New GG brand series continues the design philosophy that items should not only be popular for a season, but remain timeless as time passes. The classic interlaced letter element derived from the initials of Guccio Gucci continues to inject brand identity charm into new designs. This Ophidia small bag features the historic GG Supreme canvas material, with double G accessories. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, brown leather trim, double G, adjustable top handle, top zip closure. Model: 735145. Dimensions: 21*19*5cm. Color: Brown/pvc. Italian creation

items.name_en: Ophidia Small Handbag Monogram (with Crossbody Strap)
items.name_cn:
Ophidia Small Handbag Monogram (with Crossbody Strap)
The GG logo evolved from the Gucci diamond quilted pattern of the 1930s and has since become a traditional symbol of the brand. This small handbag from the new Ophidia collection incorporates this highly recognizable pattern. Double G accessories add charm to the overall look.
Dimensions: 15.5*25*6cm
Style No.: 735132

items.name_en: Model: 499623 Red
items.name_cn:
Model: 499623 Red
Size: 25x14x8cm
Gucci Dionysus Diamond-Clasp
True fan favorite, absolutely stunning.
Preserves the perfect lineage of the Dionysus bag,
but ushers in a new era of Dionysus leather!
The most valuable part of the bag is the tiger head diamond clasp.
A treasure item. Not a market item.
Very light, perfect size, highly recommended.

items.name_en: Model 781392 Large
items.name_cn:
Model 781392 Large
Size 34/32/17cm
Gucci Ophidia hobo shoulder bag
Today's vibe is given by the hobo!!!
This bag really fits into daily life, casual yet stylish.
Large capacity but lightweight and compact, perfectly satisfying daily outings.
Plus, the strap is longer than most shoulder bags and adjustable.
Love at first sight, stylish and practical!

items.name_en: 💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】The Gucci Go series is designed for sport. This shoulder bag is made of glossy leather, featuring a delicate chain strap that exudes a modern temperament. The interior layout is practical, with a removable mirror on the back.
items.name_cn:
💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】The Gucci Go series is designed for sport. This shoulder bag is made of glossy leather, featuring a delicate chain strap that exudes a modern temperament. The interior layout is practical, with a removable mirror on the back.
Gucci Black (Rosso Ancora) Glossy Leather
Light gold-tone hardware
Black cotton-linen lining
Interior: three main compartments, one zip pocket
Exterior: removable mirror on the back
Chain strap (21cm high); detachable adjustable shoulder strap (27cm high); length adjustable between 64cm and 103cm
Spring buckle
Model: 826761.
Dimensions: 21.5cm (W) x 14cm (H) x 9cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.8kg
Color: Black full-grain leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: Imported original leather💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】The brand's iconic GG Marmont series ingeniously incorporates double-G logo hardware and cut-chain straps, selected from soft leather to create a soft silhouette. A simple back pocket adds practicality to the medium and large bags.
items.name_cn:
Imported original leather💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】The brand's iconic GG Marmont series ingeniously incorporates double-G logo hardware and cut-chain straps, selected from soft leather to create a soft silhouette. A simple back pocket adds practicality to the medium and large bags.
Black V-shaped Matelassé lambskin
Light gold-tone hardware
Gucci AnacRed adhesive fiber lining
Double G
Interior: one zip pocket
Exterior: one open pocket
Sliding chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (56cm high)
Spring buckle flap
Model: 837267.
Dimensions: 26cm (W) x 15cm (H) x 7cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.65kg
Color: Black full-grain leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy
